children.name: Every inhabited country has a positive population
parameters: Check(env='countries', label='Every inhabited country has a positive population', case=None, spec={'name': 'Every inhabited country has a positive population', 'request': {'path': '', 'params': {'response_fields': 'names.common,population,capitals'}, 'paginate': {'style': 'offset', 'param': 'offset', 'page_size': 25, 'unwrap': '$.data.objects'}}, 'asserts': [{'path': '$', 'length_gte': '${env.min_results_count}'}], 'custom': ['countries_population_rules']})

children.name: Resolved timezone is a non-empty string [New York]
parameters: Check(env='weather', label='Resolved timezone is a non-empty string [New York]', case={'name': 'New York', 'latitude': 40.7128, 'longitude': -74.006, 'timezone': 'America/New_York'}, spec={'name': 'Resolved timezone is a non-empty string', 'cases': 'cities.json', 'case_id': 'name', 'request': {'path': 'forecast', 'params': {'latitude': '${case.latitude}', 'longitude': '${case.longitude}', 'hourly': 'temperature_2m', 'timezone': 'auto'}}, 'expect_status': 200, 'asserts': [{'path': '$.timezone', 'type': 'str'}, {'path': '$.timezone', 'non_empty': True}]})

children.name: Germany record matches the country schema contract
parameters: Check(env='countries', label='Germany record matches the country schema contract', case=None, spec={'name': 'Germany record matches the country schema contract', 'request': {'path': 'names.common/germany'}, 'validator': 'CountryValidator', 'unwrap': '$.data.objects', 'validate': 'first', 'asserts': [{'path': '$.data.objects', 'length_gte': '${env.min_results_count}'}]})

children.name: Resolved timezone is a non-empty string [Sydney]
parameters: Check(env='weather', label='Resolved timezone is a non-empty string [Sydney]', case={'name': 'Sydney', 'latitude': -33.8688, 'longitude': 151.2093, 'timezone': 'Australia/Sydney'}, spec={'name': 'Resolved timezone is a non-empty string', 'cases': 'cities.json', 'case_id': 'name', 'request': {'path': 'forecast', 'params': {'latitude': '${case.latitude}', 'longitude': '${case.longitude}', 'hourly': 'temperature_2m', 'timezone': 'auto'}}, 'expect_status': 200, 'asserts': [{'path': '$.timezone', 'type': 'str'}, {'path': '$.timezone', 'non_empty': True}]})

children.name: Resolved timezone is a non-empty string [London]
parameters: Check(env='weather', label='Resolved timezone is a non-empty string [London]', case={'name': 'London', 'latitude': 51.5074, 'longitude': -0.1278, 'timezone': 'Europe/London'}, spec={'name': 'Resolved timezone is a non-empty string', 'cases': 'cities.json', 'case_id': 'name', 'request': {'path': 'forecast', 'params': {'latitude': '${case.latitude}', 'longitude': '${case.longitude}', 'hourly': 'temperature_2m', 'timezone': 'auto'}}, 'expect_status': 200, 'asserts': [{'path': '$.timezone', 'type': 'str'}, {'path': '$.timezone', 'non_empty': True}]})

children.name: Resolved timezone is a non-empty string [Nairobi]
parameters: Check(env='weather', label='Resolved timezone is a non-empty string [Nairobi]', case={'name': 'Nairobi', 'latitude': -1.2921, 'longitude': 36.8219, 'timezone': 'Africa/Nairobi'}, spec={'name': 'Resolved timezone is a non-empty string', 'cases': 'cities.json', 'case_id': 'name', 'request': {'path': 'forecast', 'params': {'latitude': '${case.latitude}', 'longitude': '${case.longitude}', 'hourly': 'temperature_2m', 'timezone': 'auto'}}, 'expect_status': 200, 'asserts': [{'path': '$.timezone', 'type': 'str'}, {'path': '$.timezone', 'non_empty': True}]})

children.name: A country found by name appears within its own region
parameters: Check(env='countries', label='A country found by name appears within its own region', case=None, spec={'name': 'A country found by name appears within its own region', 'steps': [{'request': {'path': 'names.common/germany'}, 'save': {'common': '$.data.objects.0.names.common', 'region': '$.data.objects.0.region'}}, {'request': {'path': 'region/${vars.region|lower}', 'params': {'response_fields': 'names.common'}, 'paginate': {'style': 'offset', 'param': 'offset', 'page_size': 25, 'unwrap': '$.data.objects'}}, 'custom': ['country_appears_in_region']}]})

children.name: Forecast schema and sanity [Nairobi]
parameters: Check(env='weather', label='Forecast schema and sanity [Nairobi]', case={'name': 'Nairobi', 'latitude': -1.2921, 'longitude': 36.8219, 'timezone': 'Africa/Nairobi'}, spec={'name': 'Forecast schema and sanity', 'cases': 'cities.json', 'case_id': 'name', 'request': {'path': 'forecast', 'params': {'latitude': '${case.latitude}', 'longitude': '${case.longitude}', 'hourly': 'temperature_2m', 'timezone': 'auto'}}, 'expect_status': 200, 'validator': 'ForecastValidator', 'validate': 'single', 'asserts': [{'path': '$.latitude', 'approx': '${case.latitude}', 'tol': 1.0}, {'path': '$.longitude', 'approx': '${case.longitude}', 'tol': 1.0}, {'path': '$.hourly.time', 'length_gte': '${env.min_results_count}'}]})

children.name: Europe region returns more than the minimum number of countries
parameters: Check(env='countries', label='Europe region returns more than the minimum number of countries', case=None, spec={'name': 'Europe region returns more than the minimum number of countries', 'request': {'path': 'region/europe', 'params': {'response_fields': 'names.common'}, 'paginate': {'style': 'offset', 'param': 'offset', 'page_size': 25, 'unwrap': '$.data.objects'}}, 'asserts': [{'path': '$', 'length_gt': 40}]})
